extraction.one_line_summary: MOSCON Gianni attacked from the bottom of the final climb to Mashan, winning solo with GROßSCHARTNER Felix taking second
tactical_patterns: MOSCON attacked immediately at climb base creating consternation behind, riders spread across road unable to organize chase effectively
KÜNG Stefan animated early breakaway despite time trial specialty, suggesting Sky wanted insurance rider forward if climb tactics failed
Trek-Segafredo and EF Education First controlled peloton tempo approaching climb, yet neither placed rider on podium revealing positioning superiority gaps

rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: attacked from climb base and held solo advantage 17.5km, converting early aggression into race lead without teammates
rider_signals.GROßSCHARTNER Felix: positive: outsprinted CHERNETSKI for second after failing to bridge to MOSCON, signaling superior finishing speed among chasers
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: EF Education First controlled approach yet URÁN invisible on decisive climb, suggesting form deficit despite team investment
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: animated breakaway and won all three intermediate sprints despite time trial specialty, showing unexpected endurance willingness
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: neutral: held race lead into queen stage but predictably lost it, retained comfortable points lead cushion
